basicAttack.name: Destructive Sequence
basicAttack.description:
BASIC ATTACK: 
An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>. As the controlled operator, <#ba.lastcombo>Final Strike</> also deals <@ba.poise>{poise:0}</> Stagger. 

DIVE ATTACK: 
Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> to nearby enemies. 

FINISHER: 
Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and recovers some SP.

battleSkill.name: Constructive Sequence
battleSkill.description: A forceful burst of <@ba.key>Originium Crystals</> that attacks enemies within the area of effect. Deals <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and applies <#ba.crush>Crush</>.

comboSkill.name: Sealing Sequence
comboSkill.description:
COMBO TRIGGER: When another operator in the team deals DMG with combo skills. 
Rushes to the enemy's side to deal <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> and attach <@ba.key>Originium Crystals</> that temporarily seal them. Applying <#ba.physicalstatus>Physical Status</> or <#ba.noguard>Vulnerability</> to the sealed enemy shatters the <@ba.key>Originium Crystals</> and deals additional <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>.

ultimate.name: Bombardment Sequence
ultimate.description: Bombards the ground with <@ba.key>Originium Crystals</>, dealing massive <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</> to all enemies within a fan-shaped area. If the enemy already has <@ba.key>Originium Crystals</> on them, this skill shatters the <@ba.key>Originium Crystals</> and deals 1 more hit of <@ba.pd>Physical DMG</>.

levels: Hitting at least 2 targets with the battle skill or ultimate shortens combo skill cooldown by {0,0:0.0}s.
Hitting at least 2 targets with the battle skill or ultimate shortens combo skill cooldown by {0,0:0.0}s.
talent1.name: Essence Disintegration

levels: Enemies sealed by <#ba.originium>Originium crystals</> take <@ba.vup>{0,0:0%}</> more Physical DMG.
Enemies sealed by <#ba.originium>Originium crystals</> take <@ba.vup>{0,0:0%}</> more Physical DMG.
talent2.name: Realspace Stasis

files.main:
<@profile.key>CODENAME: Endministrator 
GENDER: ■■ 
AUTHENTICATION: ■■ 
DOB: ■■ 
RACE: ■■ 

You remember nothing. 
Your memories lie in fragments, like dreams crushed to dust, disappearing at the slightest thought. 
Sometimes it makes you unsettled, sometimes uneasy, yet it grants you a quiet moment to breathe and think. 
Most of the time, however, there is no pause for doubt. You simply just trust those before you and press on. 
Perhaps you have tucked your past memories away, even if just for a little while... 
...and so, you remember nothing. </>
files.humanResources: <@profile.key>You have lived through all of Talos-II's history...</>
files.file1: <@profile.key>But ... what will you make of its future?</>

potential1.name: Memory Mesh
potential1.author: 狂zip
potential1.description: The last log is a small passage, or some form of a directive. The threads have been woven and the pieces are in place. You knew about all this.

potential3.name: Quadrant
potential3.author: 廻轉
potential3.description: You stand right at the center of the crossroads.

potential5.name: Fully Grasped
potential5.author: 수줍(Sjoop)
potential5.description: Trust and faith congealed within your palm. The first fragment is named history. Its other name is Civilization and Life.
